mapper.sql:
WHERE 1=1
AND (t.gen_type_id IS NULL OR t.gen_type_id IN #{item})
AND (t.transaction_type_id IS NULL OR t.transaction_type_id IN #{item})
AND (t.transaction_period_id IS NULL OR t.transaction_period_id IN #{item})
AND (t.contract_start_date IS NULL OR t.contract_start_date >= #{contractStartDate})
AND (t.contract_end_date IS NULL OR t.contract_end_date <= #{contractEndDate})
AND (t.is_green IS NULL OR t.is_green IN #{item})
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(t.chng_transaction_amount),0) AS totalTradedPower, COALESCE( SUM(t.base_price * t.chng_transaction_amount) / NULLIF(SUM(t.chng_transaction_amount),0),0 ) AS weightedBenchmarkPrice, COALESCE( SUM(t.chng_avg_price * t.chng_transaction_amount) / NULLIF(SUM(t.chng_transaction_amount),0),0 ) AS chngTradedPrice, COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS companyCount FROM companies c LEFT JOIN longterm_transactions t ON c.id = t.company_id LEFT JOIN transaction_types tt ON tt.id = t.transaction_type_id LEFT JOIN gen_types gt ON gt.id = t.gen_type_id LEFT JOIN transaction_periods tp ON tp.id = t.transaction_period_id

SELECT DISTINCT t.transaction_type_id FROM longterm_transactions t
AND t.transaction_type_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY t.transaction_type_id

SELECT DISTINCT t.gen_type_id FROM longterm_transactions t
AND t.gen_type_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY t.gen_type_id

SELECT DISTINCT t.transaction_period_id FROM longterm_transactions t
AND t.transaction_period_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY t.transaction_period_id

SELECT DISTINCT t.is_green FROM longterm_transactions t
AND t.is_green IS NOT NULL ORDER BY t.is_green
